suggestions: Change GenkitPlugin.static prefix to tracing:orchestrion:@genkit-ai/core:runInNewSpan so it matches the event channels created by dc-polyfill tracingChannel('orchestrion:@genkit-ai/core:runInNewSpan').

Rerun the focused suite with OTEL_TRACES_EXPORTER, OTEL_LOGS_EXPORTER, and OTEL_METRICS_EXPORTER unset. In this sandbox also remove the exported empty DD_AGENT_HOST value, because it makes tracer initialization reject http: before PluginManager.configure runs.
Keep the exact @genkit-ai/core@1.21.0 Orchestrion paths and runInNewSpan Async query; probes prove the dependency hook loads, rewriting occurs, and start/end/asyncStart/asyncEnd events fire.
Add error, streaming, interrupt, ignored-label, and public ESM coverage after restoring the five success cases.
test_output_summary: Authoritative baseline with all three OTEL exporter variables explicitly unset: 0 passing, 5 failing, 0 pending; model, flow/flowStep, tool, retriever, and embedder each time out after their real operation returns while waiting for a trace. The sandbox exports DD_AGENT_HOST as an empty string, causing Config to construct invalid URL http: and tracer initialization to stop before PluginManager.configure; a probe observes configuredPlugins=[genkit], managerConfigured=false, and no instantiated plugins. After unsetting only that empty host variable, Genkit is instantiated but the suite remains 0/5: the plugin subscribes to orchestrion:@genkit-ai/core:runInNewSpan:* while Orchestrion emits tracing:orchestrion:@genkit-ai/core:runInNewSpan:*. The probe records one each of start/end/asyncStart/asyncEnd on the emitted prefix and zero on the configured prefix. A stage-local runtime-only prefix correction produces 5 passing in 1s, proving the selected hook, config, activation, tag extraction, parent linkage, and span finishing work once the channel prefix matches.

exact_mechanism.primary_integration_defect: GenkitPlugin.static prefix omits the tracing: namespace automatically used by the tracingChannel event channels. TracingPlugin therefore binds no handler to the rewritten runInNewSpan lifecycle.
exact_mechanism.environmental_confounder: The session exports DD_AGENT_HOST='' so agent.load tracer initialization catches ERR_INVALID_URL for input http: and never calls PluginManager.configure. This independently prevents plugin instantiation until the variable is removed for the focused test process.

not_the_cause.orchestrion_config: The exact @genkit-ai/core@1.21.0 CJS function is rewritten and emits the expected lifecycle.
not_the_cause.instrumentation_hook_loading: dd-trace:instrumentation:load publishes @genkit-ai/core and the registry exposes both @genkit-ai/core and genkit as Plugin id genkit.
not_the_cause.span_finishing: asyncEnd is emitted after the promise settles, and the runtime-only prefix proof passes all five completed-span assertions.

missing_test_cases.name: streaming_completion
missing_test_cases.description: Verify generation streaming spans remain open through final provider response, finish after all chunks, and capture streaming rejection.

missing_test_cases.name: tool_interrupt
missing_test_cases.description: Pin the observed Genkit 1.21.0 ToolInterruptError child and interrupted-success outer generation semantics.

missing_test_cases.name: strict_label_allowlist
missing_test_cases.description: Verify util, prompt, evaluator, indexer, reranker, resource, and unrecognized runInNewSpan labels do not create Genkit spans while preserving parent context.

missing_test_cases.name: public_esm_usage
missing_test_cases.description: Exercise a public ESM Genkit import and assert the normally reached instrumentation.js implementation creates spans.

missing_test_cases.name: three_argument_overload
missing_test_cases.description: Exercise the source-supported registry/options/callback runInNewSpan overload and verify options extraction from arguments[1].

missing_test_cases.name: schema_validation_boundaries
missing_test_cases.description: Document and pin that input validation before runInNewSpan produces no selected span and output validation after it is outside the selected lifecycle.
